description.value: This spell enables you to converse with creatures associated with a chosen element, including but not limited to true elemental creatures. This spell gains the elemental subtype based on the version of the spell you cast. Elemental speech does not guarantee a friendly reaction; it merely enables communication. You may converse with all creatures of the selected type with an Intelligence score of 1 or greater, even if they do not understand one another. When cast as an air spell, you can converse in Auran and with any creature that has the air subtype or a fly speed. When cast as an earth spell, you can converse in Terran and with any creature that has the earth subtype or a burrow speed. When cast as a fire spell, you can converse in Ignan and with any creature that has the fire subtype. When cast as a water spell, you can converse in Aquan and with any creature that has the water subtype or a swim speed. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide. Copyright 2010, Paizo Publishing, LLC; Author: Jason Bulmahn.
